name: widget_delete_force_false_refuses_with_bindings
description: List-only negative fixture for refusing to delete a widget with bindings when force=false.

expectedContract.precondition: Create /Game/__UEvolveMcpTest/Widget/WBP_BindingSmoke with BoundButton and at least one binding or bound event.
expectedContract.postcheck: Tool returns success=false with a warning and does not remove BoundButton.
